examples.title: Model-Based Learning Pseudocode
examples.code:
MODEL_BASED_LEARNING(model, environment)
 FOR each episode
 INITIALIZE state
 FOR each step
 CHOOSE action using model
 UPDATE state and reward
 UPDATE model
 RETURN model
examples.explanation: This pseudocode illustrates the basic steps involved in model-based learning.

examples.title: Model-Based Learning Python Code
examples.explanation: This Python code implements a basic model-based learning algorithm.
